zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine de Monfort於1441年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾貝斯可特時，她的父親Lord Robert MOUNTFORT9歲，母親Lady Mary Stapleton13歲。她於1461年與Sir George Booth在英國諾福爾可埃克爾斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1498年12月7日在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾鄧翰享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine de Monfort于1441年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾貝斯可特时，她的父亲Lord Robert MOUNTFORT9岁，母亲Lady Mary Stapleton13岁。她于1461年与Sir George Booth在英国諾福爾可埃克爾斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1498年12月7日在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾鄧翰享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Monfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Montfort
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Mont
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Juan, Cristina, Domingo, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Mariano, Ramon, Trinidad.
Catalan and French: topographic name for a mountain dweller, from Catalan and (Old) French mont ‘mountain’ (from Latin mons, genitive montis). Compare French Demont and Dumont .
English: variant of   Mount  .

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine de Monfort was born in 1441, in Bescot, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Lord Robert MOUNTFORT, was 9 and her mother, Lady Mary Stapleton, was 13. She married Sir George Booth in 1461, in Eccles, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 7 December 1498, in Dunham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine de Monfort est née en 1441, à Bescot, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord Robert MOUNTFORT, avait 9 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary Stapleton, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Sir George Booth en 1461, à Eccles, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 décembre 1498, à Dunham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine de Monfort 1441 in Bescot, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord Robert MOUNTFORT 9 und ihre Mutter Lady Mary Stapleton 13. Sie hat 1461 in Eccles, Norfolk, England Sir George Booth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. Dezember 1498 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Dunham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine de Monfort è nata il nel 1441 nel Bescot, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Lord Robert MOUNTFORT, aveva 9 anni e sua madre, Lady Mary Stapleton, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Sir George Booth nel 1461, nel Eccles, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 7 dicembre 1498, nel Dunham, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine de Monfortが1441年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアベスコトで生まれた時，父Lord Robert MOUNTFORTは9歳，母Lady Mary Stapletonは13歳であった。1461年にイギリスノーフォルクエククレスでSir George Boothと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1498年12月7日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアダンハムで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine de Monfort(이)가 1441년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 베스컷에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Robert MOUNTFORT(은)는 9세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Mary Stapleton(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1461년 영국 노르폴크 치레스에서 Sir George Booth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1498년 12월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 던함에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine de Monfort nasceu em 1441, em Bescot, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lord Robert MOUNTFORT, tinha 9 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mary Stapleton, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir George Booth em 1461, em Eccles, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 7 de dezembro de 1498, em Dunham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos.

ru.1441–7 December 1498: с 10 января 1441 по 9 января 1442–7 декабря 1498 г.
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine de Monfort родилась в 1441 г. в местности бескот, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Lord Robert MOUNTFORT было 9 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary Stapleton, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir George Booth в 1461 г. в местности экклесь, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 7 декабря 1498 г. в местности дунам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет.

Se casó con Sir George Booth en 1461, en Eccles, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 7 de diciembre de 1498, en Dunham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años.
